title.en: When Aurora told the story, the whole person wa...

content.en:
"What is the Well of Origin?"

The person who asked this question was not Ye Tian, but the son of a certain era.

Obviously, not all the children of the Ages in the Twelve Universe epochs knew about the Well of Origin, and Aurora just happened to know the secret.

Aurora explained, "The Well of Origin is an ancient well that contains the power of the Origin, which is different from the Chaos Ancient Well, and even far more precious than the Chaos Ancient Well to a certain extent. The Chaos Ancient Well just contains a high concentration of Chaos Vitality, and the Chaos Space inside contains some Chaos Materials. Although the Chaos Ancient Well is rare, the Chaos Ancient Well in the universe is not rare, but the Origin Well is basically in the legend. Even the Supremes didn't find the Well of Origin, and they only learned about it in the inheritance of the Chaos Powerhouse. Especially for us, once we enter the Well of Origin and absorb the power of the Origin in the Well of Origin, we will gain insight into countless laws in a short period of time, allowing ourselves to have a deep understanding of countless laws in a very short period of time, and we can even take the opportunity to improve the attainments of the Great Dao and various secret techniques. For us, the Well of Origin is an absolutely insane treasure!"

When Aurora told the story, the whole person was in a state of excitement.

"Aurora, the Well of Origin is also extremely rare in the Origin Realm, right?"

Someone asked.

"Not bad!" Aurora nodded, "Even in the Origin Realm, it is not easy to find the Well of Origin, and the Origin Realm is also dangerous, the creatures born here are basically strong in the flesh, and our strength is suppressed here, even if we encounter some weaker creatures, we may not be able to beat them." And our speed will be very slow, very slow, and the area of the Origin Realm is very large, and it can even be said to be boundless. In addition, I don't know much about the Origin Realm, but I have heard the Supremes mention it, but I don't have a deep understanding, after all, I don't think I can enter the Origin Realm, how can I try to understand it!"

Although Aurora does not reveal many secrets, everyone has a bottom in their hearts.

First, there is no doubt that this is the Origin Realm.

Second: The biggest opportunity is the Well of Origin, once you find a Well of Origin, it will rise completely, and your strength will inevitably increase greatly, far surpassing the sons of other eras.

For example, the weaker of them is the son of the era, once he gets a well of origin, even if he can't compare to Ye Tian in a short time, it is enough to compare to Aurora.

Whew!!

One by one, the sons of the era flew away, all in different directions, and Aurora also chose one direction and flew away quickly.

Obviously, everyone is reluctant to cooperate, after all, once they encounter a well of origin, how to divide it has become a problem, and even at the cost of fighting,

Therefore, it is the most reasonable way to look for opportunities separately.

Ye Tian also teleported away from here, but he left a mark here,

After all, once he can't find a way out, he still has to go back here, even if he can't open the passage to get out, once the external supremes solve the destruction creature, there will definitely be a way to find the location of the explosion of the Tianzun-level destruction creature, so as to forcibly open the passage and enter the origin realm.

The reason why the Origin Realm is so difficult to find is that no one knows the entrance, but once the entrance is known, it is not difficult to open it again.

After leaving this area, Ye Tian searched everywhere for the Well of Origin.

After a few minutes, instead of finding the Well of Origin, he did find a creature.

"Panther!"

What appeared in front of Ye Tian's eyes was a black leopard, not very long, only about 100 meters, compared to those powerful creatures in the outside world, this black leopard was simply too ordinary.

But Ye Tian could sense the explosive power contained in every cell of this black panther, and there was no trace of excess muscles in his body.

This is not an ordinary black panther, but a powerful creature with a very strong body.

For the first time, Ye Tian used his copying talent to envelop this black panther, but he was taken aback.

"This ......"

Under his probing, the panther's talent is somewhat special.

Talents such as bloodline talents and speed talents are nothing special to outside beings, but there is one talent that is too strange.

This talent is the talent of strength.

【Strength Talent: Mystery (Extreme)】

It is not uncommon for mystical-level strength talents to be possessed, and I don't know how many people in the universe have mystical-level strength talents, and basically geniuses all have god-level strength talents.

It's no wonder that there is a limit mark behind this black panther's mystery-level strength talent, and this is also the first time Ye Tian has encountered such a talent situation.

Roar!

The black panther yelled at Ye Tian, and immediately rushed over.

Although this black panther was very strong, Ye Tian didn't care, because the strength of this black panther was far inferior to him.

Even if he was suppressed in the Origin Realm, he could still easily kill this black panther in an instant, but he didn't immediately end the life of this black panther, but lightly punched the black panther and touched it.

Rumble!

The black panther was repelled by a blow, but Ye Tian was a little surprised.

He used a strength almost comparable to that of a black panther, and then used a god-level strength talent, but even so, it only shook the black panther back, but did not bring any injuries to the black panther.

"My defense is very strong, and my body is far stronger than this panther, and it is unrealistic for the panther to want to knock me back, which means that my blow just now is actually just equal to the panther. But how is this possible, I used a god-level strength talent, and it used an arcane-level strength talent, and there is a big gap between the mystery-level strength talent and the god-level strength talent, it shouldn't be like this!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Moreover, he can guarantee that the black panther has no other special powers except for the use of physical strength and mystery-level strength talents, and even some skills are useless, and it is completely a direct attack.

"It seems that the problem lies in its extreme arcane level strength talent!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Instead of killing the panther, he captured it and sent it to the Chaos Ancient Realm where he was imprisoned.

He couldn't guarantee that every creature here was like this, and if this panther was a special case, wouldn't he be wasting a research subject?

"It's a pity that this black panther's strength talent is only at the arcane level, and my strength talent is god-level, and the copying talent can't replicate the same talent that is lower than itself, if the power talent of the black panther is the ultimate god-level strength talent, then I may still have hope of copying it. "

Ye Tian sighed.

Next, Ye Tian spent a little time and found a few more creatures in the Origin Realm.

As a result, the strength talents of these creatures are followed by signs of limits.

And all of these creatures can burst into attacks that are not equivalent to the same strength talent as they should be, and this is not an isolated case, but it is like this.

Such a result made Ye Tian have a guess.

"According to my investigation in the past few days, the creatures of the Origin Realm all have extreme strength talents, and the ultimate strength talents of the Arcane level are obviously more powerful than the normal Armagine-level strength talents, and even stronger to the extent that they are comparable to the god-level strength talents. Ye Tian said darkly.

This may not seem like a big deal, but if you encounter a creature with a god-level extreme strength talent, it will be completely different.

In the universe, the highest strength talent is only at the god level, and the strength talent of those geniuses is all at the god level, and there is no way to improve it.

Because of this, those geniuses will use various methods to learn various secret techniques to increase their strength, and burst out stronger attacks.

For example, the Tiangang Battle Method, although it is an all-round increase in combat power, it also has the effect of increasing strength, and this kind of secret technique can be called the strongest secret technique in the universe.

If he also has a god-level extreme strength talent, wouldn't it be a few times more powerful increase out of thin air, and that would be enough to increase a lot of combat power!

"You must find a god-level extreme strength talent!"

Ye Tian was excited, looking for creatures everywhere.

However, not everything went smoothly.

this day.

Ye Tian saw a hill and wanted to go up to take a look, but soon his expression changed greatly.

Because of his copying talent, he saw that this mountain had a talent, although he didn't see the god-level extreme strength talent, it was only an arcane-level extreme strength talent, but this proved that this mountain was not a mountain, but a powerful creature.

Just as Ye Tian was about to leave, two eyes appeared on the hill, and those eyes stared at Ye Tian, and a terrifying aura passed over.

Rumble!!!!

The color of the heavens and the earth changed, and unimaginable blood and qi power burst out.

Then, a stone hand probed from the stone mountain and grabbed Ye Tian.

"A creature whose physical body is definitely countless times stronger than mine, and with its physical combat power alone, I'm afraid it is not weaker than that Heavenly Venerable-level destructive creature. Even in my heyday, I had to escape!"

Ye Tian was shocked in his heart.

He didn't dare to stay, although he had the Death Flower Sea, but there was no one here to help him contain it, once he was caught by the stone hand, he could only wait for death, and slowly wait for the death flower of the Death Flower Sea to die, and it would be his turn to die.

So, he must run!

Teleport!

Teleport!

Teleport!

That stone hand seemed to have broken through the layers of void with the power of his body, and wanted to catch Ye Tian, but the defects in other aspects were too great, and he couldn't stop Ye Tian from teleporting away.

In the end, Ye Tian escaped.
